title: Portfolio - Canada.ca
content:
## Environment and Climate Change Portfolio

## Environment and Climate Change Canada
The Department informs Canadians about protecting and conserving our natural heritage, and ensuring a clean, safe and sustainable environment for present and future generations.
- Environment and Climate Change
The Agency helps Canadians have a strong sense of connection, through meaningful experiences, to their national parks, national historic sites and national marine conservation areas. The agency is committed to ensuring these protected places are enjoyed in ways that leave them unimpaired for present and future generations.

## Impact Assessment Agency of Canada
The Agency delivers high-quality environmental assessments and serves as the centre of expertise on this subject matter within the Government of Canada.
- Impact Assessment Agency of Canada
- Minister of Environment and Climate Change
- Ministerial briefing book
- Ministerial and Governor-in-Council Appointments
